---
name: ✨ Feature / Resource Request
about: Suggest a new tool, category, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation
<!-- Why should this be added? e.g., "No modern Wayland bar covers X", "Missing fetch tools for ARM" -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you're suggesting. Include: -->
- **Tool/Theme Name**: 
- **Official Link**: 
- **Category**: <!-- e.g., Bars & Panels, Terminal Eye Candy, GRUB Themes -->
- **Protocol/Compatibility**: `X11` / `Wayland` / `Both` / `Specific App`
- **Key Features**: <!-- Bullet points of what makes it awesome -->

## 🔍 Alternatives Considered
<!-- List similar existing entries and why this is different/better -->

## 📊 Maintenance Status
- [ ] Last commit ≤ 2 years ago
- [ ] ≥ 50 stars OR clear active development
- [ ] Public documentation available
- [ ] Free/Open-Source (or has free tier for customization)

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, config examples, community demand, or related discussions -->

---
> 🌟 *We appreciate thoughtful suggestions!*  
> 📖 Please review [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Quality Standards](CONTRIBUTING.md#-quality-standards) before submitting.
